title: abrigo_cost_panel_intersection_v1
description: Machine-loadable JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) for the strict joint-analysis intersection columns of the Abrigo cost panel. Joint-analysis consumers in abrigo-analytics join on the intersection PK (chain_id, tx_hash, request_id). Each property carries an x-polars-dtype annotation so a consumer maps every column to its polars dtype WITHOUT inferring from data (PITFALLS E1 — a null-only early partition would otherwise infer a Null column type and break later reads). This schema is v1-K_AI-anchored: the columns are derived from the K_AI (agent-payment) leg and carry a documented breakage budget for when K_D (abrigo-x402) ships its panel. DTYPE SCOPE RULE (B1): uint256 ID columns (request_id) are Utf8 ONLY (never Int64, never Decimal(38,0) — keccak-derived uint256 = up to 78 digits > Decimal128's 38-digit cap); wei amounts (gross_cost_native) may be Utf8 or Decimal(38,0) (provably <= 38 digits).

request_id.description: uint256 request identifier as a decimal string. Utf8 ONLY — NEVER Int64, NEVER Decimal(38,0): a keccak/topic-derived uint256 is up to 78 decimal digits, exceeding Decimal128's 38-digit cap. PK part.

tx_hash.description: Transaction hash (0x-prefixed 32-byte hex). PK part; consistent with event_schema_v1.md.

block_number.description: Block number. UInt64, NOT NULL — consistent with event_schema_v1.md arrival-ordering PK part 1.

block_ts_utc.description: Block timestamp (UTC, microsecond precision). COARSE SECONDARY — whole-second source, never sort-primary; consistent with event_schema_v1.md.

chain_id.description: EVM chain id (Somnia L1 = 5031). Int64; PK part. Consistent with event_schema_v1.md.

gross_cost_native.description: Gross cost in native wei as a decimal string. Wei amount provably <= 38 digits (SOMI wei ~1e16-1e17 ~17-18 digits) — Utf8 OR Decimal(38,0), never Int64.

gross_cost_usd.description: Gross cost in USD. Nullable (FX may be stale; no native SOMI/USD on-chain oracle).

net_cost_usd.description: Net cost in USD after burn/validator rebate accounting. Nullable.

fx_rate.description: SOMI/USD cross-rate applied to derive gross_cost_usd. Nullable (off-chain source, may be stale).

fx_source_ts_utc.description: Timestamp of the FX observation applied (UTC). Nullable.

schema_version.description: Schema version tag (abrigo_cost_panel_intersection_v1). NOT NULL — required for the explicit cross-version read filter (PITFALLS E4).
